# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Pull Request Review Guidelines

### When to Skip Reviews

Do not provide code reviews for pull requests that are marked as work-in-progress. This includes:

- Pull requests marked as "Draft" in GitHub
- Pull requests with titles containing "WIP", "[WIP]", "Work in Progress", or similar indicators
- Pull requests labeled with "wip", "work-in-progress", or "do-not-review"

For work-in-progress pull requests, skip the review and wait until the PR is marked as ready for review.
